title: rosa polyantha var. genuina
intro: Rosa polyantha var. genuina is a type of wild rose plant, belonging to the family Rosaceae, known for its fragrant flowers and medicinal properties. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive problems, due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. Rosa polyantha var. genuina is rich in flavonoids and phenolic acids, which provide its medicinal benefits and contribute to its use in herbal remedies, such as teas, infusions, and ointments. The plant's health benefits include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and supporting the immune system, making it a valuable resource in traditional medicine.
